titleStmt.title: SII 26.772: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 772. (A.R. No. 721 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Uḍaiyār śrī Rājādhirājadēva I: Year 31, day 236, Kumbha (Māśi) = 1049 A.D., January-February.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tiṅgaḷēr taru etc.

It records that a number of Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple of Śrī Kayilāyamuḍaiyār of Śrī-Madurāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Poygai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, received a sum of 5 kāśu towards burning 1/2 a nuṉdā lamp using one āḻākku of ghee from a certain Śīmādēvaṉ Echchilmaṇḍai alias Ishabhavāhanapichchan, a merchant of the place. The Śivabrāhmaṇas had agreed to measure out an āḻākku of ghee daily and to burn 1/2 a nuṉdā lamp in the central shrine of the temple of Śrī-Kayilāsam-uḍaiyamahādēvar, hereditarily.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiṅkaḷer taru tantoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkīḻ nila
makaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkolo
ccik karuṅkali kaṭintu taṉ ciṟutātai
yum tiruttamaiyaṉaiyuṅ kuṟikkoḷ
tanniḷaṅkokkaṉaiyum neṟi Uṇartaṉ tirup
putalvar tammaiyum tuṉṟeḻil vāṉavaṉ va
llavaṉ miṉavaṉ kaṅkaṉ Ilaṅkayiṟ ki
ṟaivaṉ pulaṅkaḻaṟ pallavaṉ kaṉṉakkucci
yar kāvalaneṉp poṉṉaṇicuṭar maṇima
kuṭam cūṭṭippaṭar pukaḻāṅkavar
pāṅkamar tātai
ca karamava mapat ttavata pa
tāmanā la tirumaṇime ntiracoḻaneṉa
pa maṉṉu pallūḻiyuḷ tennavar muvaruḷ
māṉāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭi Ānāparu matiḷ pacuntalai
porkaḷattarintu vāraḷaviya niḻal virakeraḷaṉai muṉai
vaiyiṟ piṭittu tanaṉtivāraṇa katākaṭakkaḷiṟṟāl lutai
ppitaruḷi Antamil perumpukaḻ cuntarapāṇṭi
yaṉ Oṟṟai veṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟṟai veṇkavariyuṅ ciṅkācaṉa
mum veṇkaḷattiḻantu taṉmuṭiviḻattalai virittaṭi taḷarntoṭa
tollaiya mullaiyūr turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicai
ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻ Irāma makuṭam muvarkeṭa muṉi
ṉtu viṭal keḻuvillavaṉ cuṭarmaṭik koṇṭu taṉṉoṭu viṭ
ṭoṭikkāṭu pukkoḷippa vañciyam putumalar malaintāṅkeñ
calil velaikeḻu kāntaḷūr cālaiy kalamaṟuppittākavamalla
ṉum Añcakkevu taṉṟāṅkarum paṭaiyāl Āṅkavaṉ ce
ṉaiyum kaṇṭappayaṉum kaṅkātiraṉum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟo
ṭu maṭiya tiṇṭiṟal viritāvikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum tarumu
ṟaṭcāṅkamaiyaṉu mutaliṉar camarapiru vottuṭai ṉimir cuṭarppon
noṭayaṅkari puraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyil jayaṅ
koṇṭu tuṉṉār koḷḷippākkaiy Oḷḷeri maṭuppittoru taṉi
taṇṭāl poru kaṭalilaṅkaiyar komakaṉ vikkiramapākuviṉ makuṭa
mum muṉṟaṉakkuṭainta tenṟamiḻ maṇṭalam muḻuvatum Iḻantu
Eḻkaṭalilum pukku Ilaṅkecaṉāy vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ paru
maṇimakuṭamum kāṇṭaku taṉatākit taṉ kaṉṉakkucciyilum Ārkali Īḻañ
ciṟiteṉṟeṇṇi ḷaiṅkoḷ taṉṉoṭu taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅkumu
ṭikavitta viracalāmekaṉ porukaḷattaiñci
k kārkkaḷiṟiḻantu kavvaiyuṟṟoṭik kātaliyoṭum ta
ṉ ṟavvaiyaip piṭittut tāyai mukkariya Ā
ṅkavamāṉam niṅkutaṟkāka miṭṭum va
ntu vāṭṭoḻil luḻantu veṅ
kaḷattu lurnatavacciṅkaḷattaracaṉ po
ṉṉaṇimuṭiyuṅ kaṉṉaraṉ vaḻi
vanturai koḷḷiḻattaraicaṉākiya
cirvallavaṉ mataṉarājaṉaiyum
cilloḷittaṭamaṇi muṭiyuṅkoṇṭu vaṭapula
ttirukālāvatum porupaṭai naṭāttik kaṇṭartina
karaṉ nāraṇaṉ kaṉavati vaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtaṉaṉ
Eṉṉaiya pallavaraicaṉ ṉaivayiṟṟu ratti vampala
r tirupoḻil kampilinakaruḷ caḷukkiyar māḷikai takarppi
ttiḷakkamil taṉtai muṉ Untakantara kaḷiṟṟuccakkaravartti
vikkiramaṉāraṇaṉṟaṉ perumpaṭai Ōrai Evi muṉpaṭarāhava
mallaṉ Añciṉaneṉa meṟ meṟ koṇ
ṭu taṇ puṉaipperiyāṟṟaṅkaraippūṇṭurakaṭakkamā
vaiyil mun muṟaimaiyal lenṟetir viṭṭa
kiḷar neṭuvel teluṅkaviccayanta
mpiyar Iruvarum vampiyar cilaikkai Ata
ta rā ma Akkappayaṉum
ccaka kaḷiṟṟu ṭi makkaiccoḻa
num koṇṭaiyarācanum kuni cilai
muñcayaṉum taṇṭanāyakaṉ tāṉataṉañciya
num paiyyaṉum viramāṇikkanu
m meṉappaṭaiñaroṭetir cama la
nā Ākarācanum Avaṉ tuṇaivimaru
m vākaiviccayaṉ makaṉum mātā
vu meṉumivar mivar mutaliṉar puṉai
kaḻallaraicaroṭeṇṇa
ru makaḷḷirai tuṇṇeṉa piṭipitteḻarai
ilakkamum pāḻpaṭaccinavi puṇṭukkaṭakkam
poṭi paṭutta cuṉṉamār kaṇṭurakkamu Er cela
nāṭārtti varāṭkai vitaittu maṇa ṇatippayil
pār varu māḷikaip paṭarreri parappi Āṅkamāṉakar veṅkai
miteḻuti vi(ya)jayastampam nāṭṭuvittiyallicaivilla
var minavar veḻakuḷacaḷukkiyar vallavar kaucalar vaṅka
ṇar koṅkaṇar cintu rācayar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An=tā
liyar Araiciṭu tiṟaikaḷum Āṟillonṟavaniyuḷ kūṟu �
poruḷkaḷum Ukantu nān maṟaiyavar mukarntu koḷakkuṭu
ttu vicuvalokattu viḷaṅku manuneṟi ninṟu Aśva
metam cetu Araicu viṟṟirunta [jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa]n
uyarnta perumpukaḻ [kovirājakecaripaṉmarā]ṉa Uṭai
yār rājātirājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu
vaṭakarai rājenti ciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu poykai nāṭṭubra
mmateyam śrīmaturāntaka śaturvetimaṅkalattu śrīkayilā
samuṭaiyār civappirāmaṇan pāratāyan nampippirān nā
ṇac ciyam Ikkuṭimāṭa muṭaiyān kūttanum Ikku
nār ṉaraciṅkapaṭṭanum kāsiyapan tecaviṭaṅkan
Iccirā tarkkiya namaccivāya Iṣavanum Ivanṟampi
namaccivāyam piriyātānum Ivan tampi namaccivāyam cāt
tanum Ikkuṭi cāttan kunṟanum tārkariyan Āccan karumāṇi
yum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr Irukkum viyāpāri cimāteva
ṉ Eccil maṇṭaiyāna Iṣavavāhanapiccaṉukku nāṅka
ḷ kalveṭṭuvitta paricāvatu Ivāṇṭai kumpa nāyaṟṟu
nāḷ 2 100 3 10 Āṟu mutal koṇṭa kācu 5 Ikkācu Añcukkum
kāci vāy nāḻi nellu palicaiyāl polinta nāḷ On
nukku polin
tu vanta nellu
Aññāḻi Inne
llaññāḻikkum A
ṭṭak kaṭava ney Āḻā
kku Inney Āḻākkum
Ivvūr śrīkayilāsamuṭaiya
māhādevar koyil tiru
vuṇṇāḻikaiyiṉ U
nnāl Erikka kaṭava tirunu
ṉtā viḷakku Araiyu
m Iññāḷ mutal cantirātit
taval ṉāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ va
rgga(ka)ttārum Eṅkaḷāl �
vārum Ittirunantā vi
ḷakkaraiyum Erikkak
kaṭavom Ākavum I
t tiruviḷakkerikkum
potu munpu niṉṟu pa
ṇi ceyya Ikkoyi
lil paṭi kaṭantu puk
komey Erikkakkaṭa
vomāka Ipparicu Icai
ntu cimātevaṉ Eccil
maṇṭaiyāṉa Iṣapavā
haṉappittaṉ pakkal Ika
caṟak koṇṭu Ikkalveṭ
ṭu vittom Ivvaṉaivom §
